title: fragaria virginiana var. australis
intro: Fragaria virginiana var. australis, also known as the southern wood's strawberry, is a variety of the strawberry plant native to North America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to its high concentration of salicylic acid and flavonoids. The health benefits of Fragaria virginiana var. australis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
